app.aboutMe: Recent graduate with an associate degree in Programming at 'Hogeschool Gent' (Ghent College). I am constantly seeking new challenges to keep me busy and overcoming them drives me to learn more. I am passionate about application development/integration/management. Specialised in C# (.NET), Clojure, JavaScript (React), UML and MySQL/Microsoft SQL Server. The next goal is to find a work place so I can work in a team on real life innovative use cases, learn about the current IT workplace climate and keep improving my skillset along more experienced software developers.
app.job: Currently looking for a new opportunity (based around 'Mechelen').
app.experience: Internship at Lorre Engineering where I worked on a the backend and frontend of the hospital application LEMPweb. LEMPweb is application where patients can view and edit their meal menus for the next few days. I learned the programming language Clojure for this internship for both the backend and the frontend and implemented database management code in PostgreSQL.
